method.name: MockError
method.summary: Always throws an exception with a message containing the [paramref name="number"/].
method.remarks: This test method verifies that an unhandled service-side exception is converted into a [c]CarbonServiceException[/c] expected on the client-side.

parameter.name: number
parameter.description: An arbitrary number to pass into the mock Exception.

return.description: No value will ever be returned. An Exception is always thrown (there is a one in 4 billion chance of no throw).

method.name: GetServiceInfo
method.summary: Gets information about the hosting environment and version of the service.

return.description: An instance of a [c]ServiceInfo[/c] class.

method.name: StartSessionFree
method.summary: Starts a web service session using the restricted free licensing account.

A successful request causes the returned session id to be included in the headers of all subsequent service calls, effectively indicating to the service that the calls are coming from an authenticated session.

parameter.name: clientIdentifier
parameter.description: A value that identifies the client using the free licence. Use an email address, company name or similar distinctive value.

parameter.name: skipCache
parameter.description: True to skip any cached licence and force retrieval of a new one from the licensing web service.

return.description: Summary information about the licensing account associated with the session.

method.name: LoginId
method.summary: Authenticates account Name and Password credentials. Does not start a session.

parameter.name: skipCache
parameter.description: True to skip any cached licence and force retrieval of a new one from the licensing web service.

return.description: Summary information about the licensing account associated with the session.

exception.description: Thrown if the credentials are incorrect.

method.name: AuthenticateName
method.summary: Authenticates account Name and Password credentials. Does not start a session.

return.description: Summary information about the licensing account associated with the session.

exception.description: Thrown if the credentials are incorrect.

method.name: EndSession
method.summary: End a web service session. Licences are not returned.
method.remarks: Any active session Id is removed and subsequence web service calls will not include a session Id in the headers, effectively indicating to the service that the calls are coming from an anonymous (not authenticated) caller.

return.description: True if the session was ended, False if it was not found.

method.name: LogoffSession
method.summary: End a web service session and issue a licensing logoff.
method.remarks: Any active session Id is removed and subsequence web service calls will not include a session Id in the headers, effectively indicating to the service that the calls are coming from an anonymous (not authenticated) caller.

return.description: Count of logins remaining.

method.name: ReturnSession
method.summary: End a web service session and issue a licensing return.
method.remarks: Any active session Id is removed and subsequence web service calls will not include a session Id in the headers, effectively indicating to the service that the calls are coming from an anonymous (not authenticated) caller.

return.description: Count of logins remaining.

method.name: ListSessions
method.summary: Lists web service sessions. Intended for use in monitoring tools.

return.description: An array of [c]SessionStatus[/c] objects.

method.name: ChangePassword
method.summary: Changes a licensing account password.

return.description: A result code and optional error message.

method.name: UpdateAccount
method.summary: Updates selected account details.

return.description: A result code and optional error message.

method.name: OpenCloudJob
method.summary: Opens a cloud job and selects it for the crosstab engine.

return.description: An optional aggregation of information about the opened job.

exception.description: Thrown if the credentials are incorrect or the service call fails.

method.name: CloseJob
method.summary: Closes the currently open job.

return.description: True if the job was closed. False if no job was open.

method.name: ReadFileAsLines
method.summary: Reads the text lines from a file.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: Simple or path qualified name of the file to read.

return.description: Text lines of a file under the job home directory. Null is returned if the file is not found.

method.name: ListSimpleToc
method.summary: List the structure and contents of a job's simple Table of Contents.

parameter.name: load
parameter.description: User name of the TOC section to return.

return.description: An array of root nodes representing the hierarchical structure and contents of the simple Table of Contents of the currently open job.

method.name: ListFullToc
method.summary: List the structure and contents of a job's full Table of Contents.

return.description: An array of root nodes representing the hierarchical structure and contents of the full Table of Contents of the currently open job.

method.name: ListExecUserToc
method.summary: List the structure and contents of a job's Exec User Table of Contents.

return.description: An array of root nodes representing the hierarchical structure and contents of the Exec User Table of Contents of the currently open job.

method.name: GetProps
method.summary: Get the display proeprties of the currently open job.

return.description: A [c]XDisplayProperties[/c] class instance containing job properties.

method.name: SetProps
method.summary: Sets the display properties of the currently open job.

parameter.name: props
parameter.description: A [c]XDisplayProperties[/c] class instance containing the new job properties.

return.description: The return value is currently unused and is always zero.

method.name: Filter
method.summary: Drill filters the current report.

parameter.name: request
parameter.description: A [c]FilterRequest[/c] class instance containing the filter parameters.

return.description: Results of report filtering.

method.name: GenTab
method.summary: Generates a crosstab report in different formats.

return.description: Lines of a crosstab report.

method.name: LoadReport
method.summary: Loads a report and sets it as the currently loaded and active report for the session.

parameter.name: request
parameter.description: Job relative path and name of the report to load.

return.description: The reponse code is currently always zero (TODO what errors can happen?).

method.name: BlankReport
method.summary: Sets the currently report to the 'blank' default state.

return.description: A status code and optional error message.

method.name: GenerateXlsx
method.summary: Generates XLSX for the currently loaded report.

return.description: The response gives the url and attributes of the generated XLSX workbook.

method.name: MultiOxt
method.summary: Generates OXT outputs for multiple reports.

method.name: MultiOxtStart
method.summary: Starts backgorund generation of OXT outputs for multiple reports.

return.description: A unique identifier of the background process.

method.name: MultiOxtQuery
method.summary: Gets the status of background generation of multiple reports.

parameter.name: id
parameter.description: Id of the background processing to query.

method.name: MultiOxtCancel
method.summary: Cancels a background generation of multiple reports.

parameter.name: id
parameter.description: Id of the background processing to cancel.

return.description: True if the background process was found and cancelled.

method.name: GetProperties
method.summary: Gets the display properties of the current report.

method.name: DeleteReport
method.summary: Deletes a report or folder in the user's TOC.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The name of the report relative to the TOC root

return.description: A status code and optional error message.

method.name: QuickUpdateReport
method.summary: PENDING.

return.description: Details of the generated report.

method.name: GenTabPandas1
method.summary: LEGACY : Transforms the current report into hard-coded JSON in Python pandas library format 1.

return.description: A string of pandas compatible JSON in legacy format 1.

method.name: GenTabPandas2
method.summary: LEGACY : Transforms the current report into hard-coded JSON in Python pandas library format 2.

return.description: A string of pandas compatible JSON in legacy format 2.

method.name: ReformatTable
method.summary: Reformats and regenerates a display table without altering the underlying data.

parameter.name: props
parameter.description: A [c]XDisplayProperties[/c] class instance containing the updated report display properties.

return.description: Lines of a reformatted crosstab report.

method.name: SaveReport
method.summary: Saves the current crosstab report as a job relative path and name.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: Job relative name of the report to save. Any invalid characters in the name are converted to underscore '_'.

method.name: ListReports
method.summary: Lists saved reports as a hierarchy of nodes.

return.description: Root nodes representing the shape and contents of the reports directory.

method.name: ListVartrees
method.summary: List variable tree names in the currently open job.

return.description: A non-null array of variable tree names in the currently open job.

method.name: VartreeAsNodes
method.summary: Gets a variable tree as a hierarchy of nodes.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The name of the variable tree to retrieve.

return.description: Root nodes representing the shape and contents of a variable tree.

method.name: ListAxisTrees
method.summary: List axis tree names in the currently open job.

return.description: A non-null array of axis tree names in the currently open job.

method.name: AxisTreeAsNodes
method.summary: Gets a axis tree as a hierarchy of nodes.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The name of the axis tree to retrieve.

return.description: Root nodes representing the shape and contents of a axis tree.

method.name: GetVarMeta
method.summary: Gets a metadata for a variable name.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The name of the variable to retrieve.

return.description: A [c]VarMeta[/c] class instance containing metadata for a variable name.

method.name: FunctionAction
method.summary: Creates, edits or deletes functions.

return.description: A status code and optional error message.

method.name: ListDashboards
method.summary: Lists dashboards for a customer and job.

return.description: An array of [c]AzDashboard[/c] objects.

method.name: GetDashboard
method.summary: Get a dashboard in a customer and job.

return.description: The Dashboard or null if not found.

method.name: DeleteDashboard
method.summary: Deletes a dashboard in a customer and job.

return.description: True if the dashboard was delete, false if was not found.

method.name: UpsertDashboard
method.summary: Updates or inserts a dashboard.

parameter.name: request
parameter.description: Specifies the dashboard data to update or insert.

return.description: The dashboard after processing.
